meta.mission: Automatically discover, qualify, and apply to jobs across multiple platforms using AI.
meta.mvp_priority: SPEED > PERFECTION — Build minimal working pipeline first.

modules.name: Job Discovery Engine
modules.description: Scrape and aggregate job listings from multiple platforms using AI-generated search queries.
ai_tasks: Generate optimized search queries per platform
acceptance_criteria: System scrapes LinkedIn, Naukri, and Indeed successfully
Jobs are deduplicated and stored in PostgreSQL
User sees aggregated job listings on dashboard

modules.name: Application Engine
modules.description: Automate job applications via email, LinkedIn Easy Apply, and platform-specific connectors.

channels.name: LinkedIn Easy Apply
tasks: Automate Easy Apply flow via Selenium

acceptance_criteria: Email outreach sends personalized messages with resume
LinkedIn Easy Apply automation works end-to-end

modules.name: Resume Optimization Engine
modules.description: Dynamically modify resumes per job description for ATS optimization.
features: ATS-friendly formatting (single column, standard fonts, no graphics)
acceptance_criteria: Resume is tailored per job description
Generated resume passes ATS format checks
User can view and download generated resume versions

modules.name: User Experience Flow
modules.description: Complete user-facing flow from auth to dashboard.

sub_modules.name: Dashboard
features: Show 'You are eligible for X jobs' count
NO APPLY BUTTON (initially — drives monetization trigger)
sub_modules.ux_strategy: Display job volume to trigger conversion to paid plan.

acceptance_criteria: User can sign up, log in, and reset password
User can connect at least one job platform
Dashboard shows job count and listings

modules.name: Monetization Flow
modules.description: Convert free users to paid via job volume awareness and Razorpay payment.
modules.trigger: User sees high job volume on dashboard
features: Conversion popup after job volume display
acceptance_criteria: Popup triggers when user views qualified jobs
Paid users get automated apply features unlocked

modules.name: Admin / Intelligence Engine
modules.description: AI-powered research engine that discovers new job sources and market trends.
features: AI continuously researches new job sources
Track market trends and hidden job channels

performance.notes: Beta supports 100 concurrent users; architecture must scale to 10K.

security.secrets_management: Environment variables, never in source code

before_task: If mismatch → ask user for approval

changes: Initial FSD created from product specification
Mapped existing 18 Python scripts to modules M1–M3
Defined 6 core modules with acceptance criteria
Established agent roles and task protocol
